subcodes.title: Tafsir al-Ha I (Tafsir alfayn) (Commentary on the Letter Ha’)
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath made the ornament of the Tablets of creation to be the ornament of the Alif standing between two letters, which hath shone forth and gleamed resplendent through that which was cleft asunder and made to speak. Glorified be the Lord of the Throne above whatsoever they who speak may describe, and verily He transcendeth all that they who know can comprehend [3.5s]... ...God, verily, created the Will from nothing through itself… That which I set forth in explanation of the letter Há was to extol the Tree of Bahá, for the supporters of fate recognize the decree of spontaneity
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم. الحمد لله الذی جعل طراز الالواح الابداع طراز الالف القائم بین الحرفین الذی لاح و اشرق بما استشقق و استنطق فسبحان رب العرش عما یصف القائلون و انه هو فوق ما یعرف العارفون ...
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @eternal archetypes [a'yan-i-thabitah]
